---
id: sso-controller-token
title: "Get a Profile and Token"
description: "Get an access token along with the user [Profile](/reference/sso/profile) using the code passed to your [Redirect URI](/reference/sso/get-authorization-url/redirect-uri)."
sidebar_label: "Get a Profile and Token"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/workos-api/workos
custom_edit_url: null
mask_credentials: false
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a Profile and Token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/sso/token"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get an access token along with the user [Profile](/reference/sso/profile) using the code passed to your [Redirect URI](/reference/sso/get-authorization-url/redirect-uri).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
